narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure drives crude above $100, introducing a geopolitical risk premium as markets await US CPI; USD/JPY firms to 157.63 on 300bp Fed-BoJ carry despite rising energy-led inflation risks. Gold lower -0.43%; equities +0.19%; DXY +0.32%; VIX 18.9. EUR/USD retreats to 1.1749 as the 175bp Fed-ECB differential anchors the pair. Watch US CPI at 12:30 UTC for the next primary USD directional catalyst.
